prompt:
Goal: editorial illustration for a programming textbook
Scene: Three vertical panels. Left panel "Numeric Enum": a vertical list of labels (Up, Down, Left, Right) with auto-incrementing numbers (0, 1, 2, 3) attached by small chains, a counter incrementing automatically. Center panel "String Enum": the same labels but each connected to explicit string values ("UP", "DOWN", "LEFT", "RIGHT") written on attached tags. Right panel "Const Enum": the labels are shown dissolving/fading, with their values being stamped directly into the code below, a "compiled away" ghost effect on the enum itself. Each panel has a distinct color scheme.
Style: Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational
Aspect ratio: 16:9
Background: white
Text in image: minimal or none
Avoid: photorealistic, dark, scary, complex UI screenshots
